effect_text_en: At the start of combat, if Critical Mastery <= 0: +30% Critical Hit
note: Static start-of-combat but the 'Critical Mastery <= 0' predicate is niche and outside the modeled vocabulary; kept forced-only.

effect_text_en: The state bearer increases their heals performed by 2% per turn (Permanent, max 20%)
When performing a Block: -30% extra damage received, -100% Block
At start of turn, if there are at least 2 allies in melee: +1 MP, +1 AP
At start of turn, if there are at least 2 enemies in melee: +1 MP, +1 AP
At end of turn, if an enemy is adjacent: 12% damage inflicted for the following turn (max level 6)
If the bearer uses a spell to move: Preparation +30 levels (+30% damage on next damage) (max level 6)
When inflicting single-target damage on an enemy: +18 extra damage on this target next turn (max level 6)
When single-target healing an ally: +12 extra heals on this target next turn (max level 6)
At end of turn: unused AP carried over as Critical Hit, 10% per AP (max 3 AP) (max level 6)
